creator: bs@easyname.com
text:
Hello,

We would like to submit to your list of FreeBSD Serice Providers!
http://freebsdwww.ludd.ltu.se/commercial/isp.html

www.easyname.ch and it's sister company nessus.at are managing FreeBSD Servers for KURIER, one of the largest newspaper in Europe. We offer managed servers of all varieties and operating systems, real time domain name registration services and shared web hosting services.
